summary: Stellar audience recording that captures an outstanding Grateful Dead show, praised as better than many soundboard tapes.
review: This tape is hailed as one of the great audience recordings, with the reviewer claiming it sounds ten times better than a typical soundboard. Both the performance and the audio quality received perfect scores, indicating a top‑notch concert that translates exceptionally well to listeners.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviewer gave both show and recording 5/5, signalling an exceptional performance and superb audience capture; limited to a single review so confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape described as crystal clear and even better than many soundboard recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply noted the overall greatness of the show.
